layman_headline: Crypto market is fearful and altcoins are bleeding — patience beats FOMO right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is gripped by fear, with Bitcoin dominance at 56.3% meaning money is flowing out of smaller coins and into Bitcoin. Most altcoin candidates on our watchlist are in downtrends with bearish chart structures. While a few coins like ZRO and TRUMP are approaching oversold territory, none present a clean enough setup with both technical confirmation and a strong catalyst to justify risking capital today.
layman_action: Stay in cash and wait for a clearer setup. The market is in fear mode and altcoins are underperforming. Better entries will come when we see actual reversal confirmation rather than trying to catch a falling knife.
expert_reasoning: None of the 10 candidates present a compelling risk-adjusted entry. ZRO and TRUMP both show oversold RSI readings (31 and 29 respectively), which historically correlate with bounces per our signal credibility data (RSI has a 75% win rate). However, both have bearish chart bias scores (-0.7), are below all major moving averages, and lack any volume breakout signal — our most reliable indicator at 100% win rate. ETHFI shows the strongest bullish chart bias (+0.6) with a Marubozu candle, but resistance is only 2.5% away with a terrible 0.11x risk/reward. HTX has the highest chart bias (+1.1) but RSI at 58 suggests it's already extended. With BTC dominance at 56.3% crushing altcoin flows and Fear & Greed stuck at 26, the macro environment actively works against alt entries. The prudent move is to wait for either a volume breakout confirmation on ZRO near $0.85 or broader market sentiment improvement.
risk_factors: U.S.-Iran military escalation could trigger a broader risk-off move, sending alts down another 10-20%
BTC dominance at 56.3% and rising means capital continues flowing away from altcoins
All oversold candidates (ZRO, TRUMP) have bearish chart structures — oversold can stay oversold in downtrends
watch_list: ZRO price action at $0.88-0.90 support — a volume-confirmed bounce here would be actionable
Fear & Greed index movement — a shift above 30 with improving trend would signal safer alt entries
BTC dominance — a reversal below 55% would unlock altcoin rotation and improve all candidate setups
market_context: Crypto markets are in a fear state (26/100) with BTC flat near $63.9K and high dominance at 56.3% crushing altcoin performance. Geopolitical tension from U.S.-Iran strikes and stalled crypto IPO activity add macro headwinds.
context_banner: Fear dominates the market with no clean altcoin setups — capital preservation is the highest-conviction trade today.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 26 ('Fear') with weekly average at 24 — improving but still dangerous for alt entries. Our 80% win rate with this signal suggests waiting for neutral territory.
ZRO RSI at 31 and TRUMP at 29 are approaching oversold, historically a bounce zone per our 75% win rate data, but neither has volume confirmation yet.
U.S. launches fresh Iran strikes creating macro risk-off pressure; crypto IPO market stalling signals institutional caution.
Bitcoin analysts suggest we're in late-stage bear market conditions, and ETH gaining on tokenization narrative — potential rotation catalyst if confirmed.
No volume breakout detected on any candidate — our most reliable signal (100% win rate, +13.4% avg return) is absent, supporting a wait-and-see approach.
